user.title: Deckhand Smart Dial
user.description: Enter your team ID to discover Deckhand dials via MQTT. You can find this in your Helm settings. Use '1' for local/Console setups.

abort.already_configured: Deckhand is already configured for this team.
abort.mqtt_not_configured: MQTT integration is not configured. Please set up MQTT first.

init.title: Deckhand options
init.description: Manage which media_player entities auto-push now-playing updates to your dials.

add.title: Add media_player binding
add.description: Pick a Deckhand dial and the media_player entity it should mirror. When the player state changes, the dial's now-playing face updates automatically. Currently configured: {count}.

remove.title: Remove bindings
remove.description:
Pick one or more bindings to delete:
{bindings}

error.missing_fields: Both a dial and a media_player entity are required.
error.not_media_player: The selected entity must be a media_player.
error.unknown_dial: The selected device is not a Deckhand dial on this integration.

unknown_device.message: The selected device is not a known Deckhand dial.

invalid_theme.message: A non-empty theme id is required.

update_from_media_player.name: Update from media player
update_from_media_player.description: Read a media_player's current state and push it to a dial as a now-playing update.

device_id.name: Device
device_id.description: The Deckhand dial device to target.
